## Measurement type

Measurement amount (non-negative number in the specified unit). Used for recipe ingredient amounts in any unit (g, mL, tsp, Tbsp, pinch).

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type Measurement = Brand<number, 'Measurement'>;
```
